data.name: 20260720081004_init/migration.sql
data.summary: Initial Prisma migration establishing the core Versus Engine schema: Category, Brand, Product, ProductImage, SpecDefinition, SpecValue, Comparison, ComparisonContender, RenderJob, and Upload tables plus their unique and lookup indexes.

data.name: Category
data.summary: Top-level product category (cars, phones, laptops, ...) keyed by slug, carrying a themeKey used to select the category's Remotion visual theme.

data.name: Brand
data.summary: Manufacturer/brand reference table (name, slug, logo, country) referenced by Product rows.

data.name: Product
data.summary: Core product entity (e.g. a specific car/phone/laptop model) storing raw specs as JSONB, provenance fields (source, sourceUrl, verifiedAt), status, and accentColor for video theming; only VERIFIED rows are eligible for rendering.

data.name: ProductImage
data.summary: Product image assets (hero shots, thumbnails, etc.) with license/attribution metadata and dimensions, linked to a Product.

data.name: SpecDefinition
data.summary: Category-scoped definition of a comparable spec (key, unit, dataType, visualization, priorityWeight) that drives the round-selection heuristic and how a spec is rendered as a video scene.

data.name: SpecValue
data.summary: Normalized, SI-unit comparable value for one Product/SpecDefinition pair, storing numeric/text/bool forms plus a display string and confidence score for AI-assisted extraction.

data.name: Comparison
data.summary: A generated comparison video record: title/tagline/tags, the frozen videoJson payload used to re-render identically, computed winnerIndex/scores, and publish status.

data.name: ComparisonContender
data.summary: Join table linking a Comparison to its contending Products in a fixed left/right position order.

data.name: RenderJob
data.summary: Tracks a BullMQ render job for a Comparison (composition, template version, progress, output/thumbnail URLs, error), designed to be idempotently keyed by comparisonId + templateVer.

data.name: Upload
data.summary: Tracks publishing a rendered Comparison to an external platform (e.g. YouTube), recording platform videoId, scheduling, and publish status/errors.

data.name: 20260720190000_phase_5_ab_thumbnails_and_analytics/migration.sql
data.summary: Phase 5 migration adding YouTube analytics tracking: VideoAnalytics (view/impression/retention metrics per upload) and RoundRetention (per-round audience retention and drop-off tied to comparisons and spec categories) tables.

data.name: VideoAnalytics
data.summary: Aggregate YouTube performance metrics (views, impressions, CTR, average view duration/percentage, retention curve) fetched for a single Upload.

data.name: RoundRetention
data.summary: Per-round audience retention breakdown (retention at start/end, drop-off) for a specific comparison round/spec, used to feed the round-selection heuristic with real viewer-retention data.

data.name: schema.prisma
data.summary: Canonical, category-agnostic data model for Versus Engine: Category/Brand/Product catalog, a scalable SpecDefinition/SpecValue system for arbitrary comparable attributes, Comparison/ComparisonContender/RenderJob/Upload for the video pipeline, and a Phase 5 VideoAnalytics/RoundRetention feedback loop. This is the single source of truth referenced throughout CLAUDE.md.

data.name: Category
data.summary: Top-level product category (cars, phones, laptops, motorcycles) that scopes products, spec definitions, and comparisons, and maps to a studio theme.

data.name: Brand
data.summary: Manufacturer/brand record (name, logo, country) associated with one or more products.

data.name: Product
data.summary: Core catalog entity for a single product (e.g. a car trim or phone model), storing raw untouched specs as JSON, verification status, source provenance, and the extracted accent color used for theming.

data.name: ProductImage
data.summary: Processed product image asset (hero, side, cutout, etc.) with licensing/attribution metadata, produced by the ingestion image pipeline.

data.name: SpecDefinition
data.summary: Per-category definition of a comparable attribute (label, unit, data type, visualization style, priority weight) — the scalability core that lets new product categories be added purely via data rows.

data.name: SpecValue
data.summary: Normalized, comparable value of a SpecDefinition for a given product, storing the SI/canonical number alongside the human-readable display string and an AI-confidence score.

data.name: Comparison
data.summary: A generated video comparison between contenders, holding the frozen videoJson payload actually rendered, YouTube metadata, and per-contender round scores for reproducible re-rendering.

data.name: ComparisonContender
data.summary: Join table linking a Comparison to the Products competing in it, ordered by position (0 = left/first).

data.name: RenderJob
data.summary: Tracks a single Remotion render invocation for a Comparison — composition variant, template version, progress, output URL, and A/B thumbnail variants.

data.name: Upload
data.summary: Tracks publishing a rendered comparison to a platform (YouTube), including the selected A/B thumbnail variant and publish scheduling.

data.name: VideoAnalytics
data.summary: Phase 5 feedback-loop entity capturing YouTube performance metrics (views, CTR, retention curve) for an uploaded video.

data.name: RoundRetention
data.summary: Per-round audience retention breakdown (start/end/drop-off) linked back to a SpecDefinition key, letting the round-selection heuristic learn which spec rounds retain viewers across many comparisons.

list.name: Video Rendering Engine
list.description: The Remotion composition (apps/studio) that consumes the Zod-validated VideoInput JSON contract and renders comparison videos through scenes, components, audio ducking, and theming, with zero category-specific logic.

list.name: Admin Dashboard
list.description: The Next.js 15 App Router application (apps/dashboard) for browsing products and comparisons, previewing renders, and queuing new video jobs.

list.name: Workers & CLI
list.description: BullMQ job workers and operator CLI scripts (apps/workers) that ingest data, trigger renders, publish videos, sync analytics, and deploy Lambda/YouTube integrations.

list.name: Comparison Engine
list.description: The round-selection and scoring heuristic (packages/comparison) that turns verified product specs into the frozen VideoInput JSON payload for rendering.

list.name: Data Layer
list.description: The Prisma schema, SQL migrations, and database client/seed data (database/ and packages/db) defining and accessing the 12-table Postgres model for products, specs, and comparisons.

list.name: Ingestion Pipeline
list.description: Source adapters (vPIC API, CSV), image processing, and AI-assisted normalization (packages/ingestion) that pull raw specs into the Product/SpecValue data model.

list.name: Narration Layer
list.description: The optional text-to-speech layer (packages/narration) that generates and synthesizes narration scripts for comparison videos.

list.name: Shared Utilities & Contracts
list.description: Cross-cutting Zod schemas, timing constants, unit conversion, slug/CSV helpers, and BullMQ queue-name constants (packages/shared) consumed by every app and package.

list.name: Vendored Agent-Skill Docs
list.description: Bundled third-party Claude Code agent-skill documentation trees (.agents/skills, agent/skills) for Remotion and Mediabunny tooling, not part of the Versus Engine application itself.

list.name: Project Governance & Build Config

table:database/migrations/20260720081004.name: 20260720081004_init/migration.sql
table:database/migrations/20260720081004.summary: Initial Prisma migration establishing the core Versus Engine schema: Category, Brand, Product, ProductImage, SpecDefinition, SpecValue, Comparison, ComparisonContender, RenderJob, and Upload tables plus their unique and lookup indexes.

table:database/migrations/20260720081004.name: Category
table:database/migrations/20260720081004.summary: Top-level product category (cars, phones, laptops, ...) keyed by slug, carrying a themeKey used to select the category's Remotion visual theme.

table:database/migrations/20260720081004.name: Brand
table:database/migrations/20260720081004.summary: Manufacturer/brand reference table (name, slug, logo, country) referenced by Product rows.

table:database/migrations/20260720081004.name: Product
table:database/migrations/20260720081004.summary: Core product entity (e.g. a specific car/phone/laptop model) storing raw specs as JSONB, provenance fields (source, sourceUrl, verifiedAt), status, and accentColor for video theming; only VERIFIED rows are eligible for rendering.

table:database/migrations/20260720081004.name: ProductImage
table:database/migrations/20260720081004.summary: Product image assets (hero shots, thumbnails, etc.) with license/attribution metadata and dimensions, linked to a Product.

table:database/migrations/20260720081004.name: SpecDefinition
table:database/migrations/20260720081004.summary: Category-scoped definition of a comparable spec (key, unit, dataType, visualization, priorityWeight) that drives the round-selection heuristic and how a spec is rendered as a video scene.

table:database/migrations/20260720081004.name: SpecValue
table:database/migrations/20260720081004.summary: Normalized, SI-unit comparable value for one Product/SpecDefinition pair, storing numeric/text/bool forms plus a display string and confidence score for AI-assisted extraction.

table:database/migrations/20260720081004.name: Comparison
table:database/migrations/20260720081004.summary: A generated comparison video record: title/tagline/tags, the frozen videoJson payload used to re-render identically, computed winnerIndex/scores, and publish status.

table:database/migrations/20260720081004.name: ComparisonContender
table:database/migrations/20260720081004.summary: Join table linking a Comparison to its contending Products in a fixed left/right position order.

table:database/migrations/20260720081004.name: RenderJob
table:database/migrations/20260720081004.summary: Tracks a BullMQ render job for a Comparison (composition, template version, progress, output/thumbnail URLs, error), designed to be idempotently keyed by comparisonId + templateVer.

table:database/migrations/20260720081004.name: Upload
table:database/migrations/20260720081004.summary: Tracks publishing a rendered Comparison to an external platform (e.g. YouTube), recording platform videoId, scheduling, and publish status/errors.

table:database/migrations/20260720190000.name: 20260720190000_phase_5_ab_thumbnails_and_analytics/migration.sql
table:database/migrations/20260720190000.summary: Phase 5 migration adding YouTube analytics tracking: VideoAnalytics (view/impression/retention metrics per upload) and RoundRetention (per-round audience retention and drop-off tied to comparisons and spec categories) tables.

table:database/migrations/20260720190000.name: VideoAnalytics
table:database/migrations/20260720190000.summary: Aggregate YouTube performance metrics (views, impressions, CTR, average view duration/percentage, retention curve) fetched for a single Upload.

table:database/migrations/20260720190000.name: RoundRetention
table:database/migrations/20260720190000.summary: Per-round audience retention breakdown (retention at start/end, drop-off) for a specific comparison round/spec, used to feed the round-selection heuristic with real viewer-retention data.

config:database/migrations/migration_loc.name: migration_lock.toml
config:database/migrations/migration_loc.summary: Prisma migration lock file pinning the database provider to PostgreSQL so all generated migrations stay consistent across environments.

schema:database/schema.prisma.name: schema.prisma
schema:database/schema.prisma.summary: Canonical, category-agnostic data model for Versus Engine: Category/Brand/Product catalog, a scalable SpecDefinition/SpecValue system for arbitrary comparable attributes, Comparison/ComparisonContender/RenderJob/Upload for the video pipeline, and a Phase 5 VideoAnalytics/RoundRetention feedback loop. This is the single source of truth referenced throughout CLAUDE.md.

table:database/schema.prisma:Category.name: Category
table:database/schema.prisma:Category.summary: Top-level product category (cars, phones, laptops, motorcycles) that scopes products, spec definitions, and comparisons, and maps to a studio theme.

table:database/schema.prisma:Brand.name: Brand
table:database/schema.prisma:Brand.summary: Manufacturer/brand record (name, logo, country) associated with one or more products.

table:database/schema.prisma:Product.name: Product
table:database/schema.prisma:Product.summary: Core catalog entity for a single product (e.g. a car trim or phone model), storing raw untouched specs as JSON, verification status, source provenance, and the extracted accent color used for theming.

table:database/schema.prisma:ProductImag.name: ProductImage
table:database/schema.prisma:ProductImag.summary: Processed product image asset (hero, side, cutout, etc.) with licensing/attribution metadata, produced by the ingestion image pipeline.

table:database/schema.prisma:SpecDefinit.name: SpecDefinition
table:database/schema.prisma:SpecDefinit.summary: Per-category definition of a comparable attribute (label, unit, data type, visualization style, priority weight) — the scalability core that lets new product categories be added purely via data rows.

table:database/schema.prisma:SpecValue.name: SpecValue
table:database/schema.prisma:SpecValue.summary: Normalized, comparable value of a SpecDefinition for a given product, storing the SI/canonical number alongside the human-readable display string and an AI-confidence score.

table:database/schema.prisma:Comparison.name: Comparison
table:database/schema.prisma:Comparison.summary: A generated video comparison between contenders, holding the frozen videoJson payload actually rendered, YouTube metadata, and per-contender round scores for reproducible re-rendering.

table:database/schema.prisma:ComparisonC.name: ComparisonContender
table:database/schema.prisma:ComparisonC.summary: Join table linking a Comparison to the Products competing in it, ordered by position (0 = left/first).

table:database/schema.prisma:RenderJob.name: RenderJob
table:database/schema.prisma:RenderJob.summary: Tracks a single Remotion render invocation for a Comparison — composition variant, template version, progress, output URL, and A/B thumbnail variants.

table:database/schema.prisma:Upload.name: Upload
table:database/schema.prisma:Upload.summary: Tracks publishing a rendered comparison to a platform (YouTube), including the selected A/B thumbnail variant and publish scheduling.

table:database/schema.prisma:VideoAnalyt.name: VideoAnalytics
table:database/schema.prisma:VideoAnalyt.summary: Phase 5 feedback-loop entity capturing YouTube performance metrics (views, CTR, retention curve) for an uploaded video.

table:database/schema.prisma:RoundRetent.name: RoundRetention
table:database/schema.prisma:RoundRetent.summary: Per-round audience retention breakdown (start/end/drop-off) linked back to a SpecDefinition key, letting the round-selection heuristic learn which spec rounds retain viewers across many comparisons.

config:examples/comparison-example-9x16..name: comparison-example-9x16.json
